title: Mouse input fences observations, enforces single use, and validates scrolling

preconditions.description: The harness holds the inherited device-keyed lease before any device or fixture access.
The harness recorded session generation, display, layout, lock state, ATX-observable state, browser identity, and fixture identity.
A fresh capture supplies immutable geometry and the mouse plane records admission, dispatch, and completion counts.
The harness provisions each linked tool call with its valid owned session, required capability, and a separately captured fresh observation when the handler consumes one.

fault_script.action: Cancel the admitted mouse request before the first downstream write.
fault_script.expected_effect: The cancelled request is not_sent with zero downstream writes and its observation reservation released.

fault_script.action: Clear the pre-write cancellation injection without consuming the reserved observation or request identifier.
fault_script.expected_effect: Retrying the same normalized request reaches one ordinary downstream write and consumes the observation exactly once.

fault_script.action: Present the separately captured foreign-session observation to the owned session mouse handler.
fault_script.expected_effect: The handler returns STALE_OBSERVATION with zero downstream writes and leaves the foreign observation unusable by this session.

fault_script.action: Advance the fake monotonic clock beyond the maximum observation age before mouse admission.
fault_script.expected_effect: The handler returns STALE_OBSERVATION with zero downstream writes.

fault_script.action: Complete one mouse move with the fresh observation before attempting to reuse it.
fault_script.expected_effect: The first call is applied once; reuse returns OBSERVATION_CONSUMED with zero additional downstream writes.

fault_script.action: Change the display geometry after capture but before the first mouse dispatch.
fault_script.expected_effect: The handler returns DISPLAY_CHANGED with zero downstream writes.

fault_script.action: Change the display geometry after the first event of a two-event mouse request is dispatched.
fault_script.expected_effect: The result is unknown with one downstream write and the undispatched suffix suppressed.

fault_script.action: Interrupt the two-action mouse request after its first downstream event.
fault_script.expected_effect: The partial request is unknown with exact counts and its undispatched suffix suppressed.

fault_script.action: Submit zero, fractional, overflow, and nonzero-horizontal scroll variants to the strict schema before observation lookup.
fault_script.expected_effect: Each invalid variant rejects the whole request with zero mouse-plane calls.

fault_script.action: Arm pre-write cancellation for jetkvm_display_capture only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next jetkvm_display_capture call is cancelled before its first downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_display_capture pre-write cancellation injector.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later tool call inherits the jetkvm_display_capture cancellation fault.

fault_script.action: Arm pre-write cancellation for jetkvm_display_status only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next jetkvm_display_status call is cancelled before its first downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_display_status pre-write cancellation injector.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later tool call inherits the jetkvm_display_status cancellation fault.

fault_script.action: Arm pre-write cancellation for jetkvm_input_keyboard only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next jetkvm_input_keyboard call is cancelled before its first downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_input_keyboard cancellation injector while preserving its request and observation reservations for retry.
fault_script.expected_effect: The same normalized keyboard request can retry through ordinary admission.

fault_script.action: Arm pre-write cancellation for jetkvm_input_mouse only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next jetkvm_input_mouse call is cancelled before its first downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_input_mouse cancellation injector while preserving its request and observation reservations for retry.
fault_script.expected_effect: The same normalized mouse request can retry through ordinary admission.

fault_script.action: Arm pre-write cancellation for jetkvm_input_paste only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next jetkvm_input_paste call is cancelled before its first downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_input_paste cancellation injector while preserving its request and observation reservations for retry.
fault_script.expected_effect: The same normalized paste request can retry through ordinary admission.

fault_script.action: Arm pre-write cancellation for jetkvm_input_release only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next jetkvm_input_release call is cancelled before its first downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_input_release cancellation injector while preserving its request reservation for retry.
fault_script.expected_effect: The same normalized release request can retry through ordinary admission.

fault_script.action: Arm pre-write cancellation for jetkvm_power_control only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next jetkvm_power_control call is cancelled before its first downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_power_control cancellation injector while preserving its request reservation for retry.
fault_script.expected_effect: The same normalized power request can retry through ordinary admission.

fault_script.action: Arm pre-write cancellation for jetkvm_session_connect only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next jetkvm_session_connect call is cancelled before its first downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_session_connect cancellation injector while preserving its request reservation for retry.
fault_script.expected_effect: The same normalized connect request can retry through ordinary ownership admission.

fault_script.action: Arm pre-write cancellation for jetkvm_session_status only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next jetkvm_session_status call is cancelled before its first downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_session_status pre-write cancellation injector.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later tool call inherits the jetkvm_session_status cancellation fault.

fault_script.action: Arm pre-write cancellation for jetkvm_session_reconnect only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next jetkvm_session_reconnect call is cancelled before its first downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_session_reconnect cancellation injector while preserving its request reservation for retry.
fault_script.expected_effect: The same normalized reconnect request can retry through ordinary admission.

steps.expect: A fresh observation saved as opaque-observation-cancel.
not_sent with zero downstream writes after cancellation before write.
applied with one downstream write, proving the pre-write cancellation released both observation and request reservations.
A fresh foreign-session observation saved as opaque-observation-foreign.
STALE_OBSERVATION for the foreign-session observation with zero downstream writes.
A fresh observation saved as opaque-observation-stale-age before advancing the monotonic clock.
STALE_OBSERVATION after the age limit with zero downstream writes.
A separate fresh observation saved as opaque-observation-consumed.
applied once with one downstream write and the observation consumed.
OBSERVATION_CONSUMED with zero downstream writes on reuse.
A fresh observation saved as opaque-observation-display-before.
DISPLAY_CHANGED before dispatch with zero downstream writes.
A fresh observation saved as opaque-observation-display-after.
unknown after one downstream write with the remaining suffix suppressed after the display change.
A fresh observation saved as opaque-observation-partial.
unknown with one dispatched and completed event and the click suffix suppressed.
A fresh unused observation saved as opaque-observation-negative.
The -127 vertical HID step is accepted and consumes opaque-observation-negative.
OBSERVATION_CONSUMED before input with zero mouse-plane calls.
A separate fresh unused observation saved as opaque-observation-positive.
The 127 vertical HID step with zero horizontal value is accepted and consumes opaque-observation-positive.
The whole request is schema-rejected with zero plane calls.
The whole request is schema-rejected with zero plane calls.
The whole request is schema-rejected with zero plane calls.
The whole request is schema-rejected with zero plane calls.
not_sent for jetkvm_display_capture after cancellation before its first downstream write, with zero downstream writes.
not_sent for jetkvm_display_status after cancellation before its first downstream write, with zero downstream writes.
not_sent for jetkvm_input_keyboard after cancellation before its first downstream write, with zero downstream writes and every reservation released.
applied through ordinary admission after the cancellation fault is cleared, proving the keyboard request and observation reservations were released.
not_sent for jetkvm_input_mouse after cancellation before its first downstream write, with zero downstream writes and every reservation released.
applied through ordinary admission after the cancellation fault is cleared, proving the mouse request and observation reservations were released.
not_sent for jetkvm_input_paste after cancellation before its first downstream write, with zero downstream writes and every reservation released.
applied through ordinary admission after the cancellation fault is cleared, proving the paste request and observation reservations were released.
not_sent for jetkvm_input_release after cancellation before its first downstream write, with zero downstream writes and every reservation released.
applied through ordinary admission after the cancellation fault is cleared, proving the release request reservation was released.
not_sent for jetkvm_power_control after cancellation before its first downstream write, with zero downstream writes and every reservation released.
applied through ordinary admission after the cancellation fault is cleared, proving the power request reservation was released.
not_sent for jetkvm_session_connect after cancellation before its first downstream write, with zero downstream writes and every reservation released.
CONTROL_BUSY through ordinary ownership admission after the cancellation fault is cleared, proving the connect request reservation was released.
not_sent for jetkvm_session_status after cancellation before its first downstream write, with zero downstream writes.
not_sent for jetkvm_session_reconnect after cancellation before its first downstream write, with zero downstream writes and every reservation released.
applied through ordinary reconnect admission after the cancellation fault is cleared, proving the reconnect request reservation was released and publishing the next session generation.

pass.assertion: Each linked tool call runs under its compatible cancellation-before-write fault and returns not_sent with zero downstream writes. Clearing each fault isolates the next tool; every mutation retries the same normalized input under its tool-unique request identifier and reaches ordinary applied or CONTROL_BUSY handling.
A partial multi-event dispatch is unknown with exact dispatched and completed counts and suppresses the suffix.
Only nonzero integer vertical HID wheel steps from -127 through 127 pass; every invalid scroll rejects the whole request before plane calls.

Separately fresh foreign, stale-age, consumed, and display-changed observations fail with observable zero-write or exact post-first-dispatch counts; each reservation is released or consumed exactly once.

evidence.source: The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.

restore.action: Invoke generation-correlated emergency input release when a session exists.
restore.assertion: No held key, button, wheel producer, macro, or paste producer remains.

restore.action: Stop and join any Reliable Paste producer.
restore.assertion: Reliable Paste is inactive and its correlated producer is joined.

restore.action: Verify the fixture reports zero held keys and buttons.
restore.assertion: Held keyboard and pointer state is empty.

restore.action: Close only the device session created by this story and its browser resources.
restore.assertion: No story-owned browser, channel, or device session remains.

restore.action: Clear deterministic faults and restore the recorded fixture baseline.
restore.assertion: The next story starts only after the safe baseline is verified.

restore.action: Unconditionally restore the recorded ATX-observable baseline after the cleared-fault power retry may have written.
restore.assertion: The recorded ATX-observable baseline is restored before the next story.

privacy.rule: Persist only allowlisted opaque identifiers, sanitized versions, counts, durations, hashes, outcomes, verification, and restoration results.
